<!--
Reusable links block for profile / CV pages.

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Replace # with your own URLs
- Delete links you do not want
- Icons use Font Awesome via quarto-ext/fontawesome shortcodes
-->

<div class="profile-links">
  <a href="#" aria-label="Website">{{< fa globe >}} Website</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" aria-label="GitHub">{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" aria-label="LinkedIn">{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000" aria-label="ORCID">{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID</a>
</div>
